## [00:00 - 00:55]

Okay, it's 300 days now you're going to use the person of influence. Well, you're going to call this client and ask them to be a person of influence with your company. That's right, you're going to call and ask for a favor. Not about your product, not about what you're trying to sell, but you're going to call and say we think so much of you, we'd like to have you speak to our company. If they're out of state, you're going to call and say I'd like you to speak to our company, our people. You could help us by doing a video conference call into our company to speak to our company because we see you as a person of influence. You're asking for a favor, people love this, it makes them feel good. It gives you a reason to call back. It's at 300 days. You could use it before this if you want to get more aggressive. It's the person of influence follow up. This is going to actually make a difference for you and turn that 20% that don't buy in the first 12 months. This could be the one that says let's roll. I'll see you in 30 days from right now.
